constitutional_requirement: Governance must define complete Broker authority, ownership, conflict resolution, and subordination.
evidence: No Broker-specific governance series defining conflict resolution and subordinate relationships was located.
remediation_recommendation: Adopt Broker governance decisions before final freeze.

constitutional_requirement: Every Broker lifecycle transition must define recovery, replay, timeout, correction, and terminal disposition.
evidence: Implementation exposes submission, case-file, and normalization flows, but no complete transition constitution artifact was found.
remediation_recommendation: Materialize Broker lifecycle transition constitution and map each transition to executable evidence.

constitutional_requirement: Every Broker object must have exactly one owner and explicit custody/mutation/reconciliation authority.
evidence: Broker ownership is described operationally, but object-level custody, mutation, reconciliation, transfer, and terminal custody matrix is absent.
remediation_recommendation: Add Broker ownership and custody matrix for requests, raw responses, canonical events, mappings, case files, capability profiles, health records, and adapter state.

constitutional_requirement: Requirement-to-verdict traceability must be bidirectional for every Broker relationship.
evidence: The audit can derive artifacts and test participation, but no complete bidirectional Requirement->Artifact->Implementation->Rule->Execution->Evidence->Finding->Verdict matrix exists for Broker.
remediation_recommendation: Publish Broker requirement-level traceability matrix with reciprocal links.
